title: La máquina que escupe monstruos y la chica de mis sueños
original_title: La máquina que escupe monstruos y la chica de mis sueños
overview: Two young friends discover a dream recording machine and start making money out of it. Meanwhile, a man discovers that the screenwriter of his life is dead, and therefore, nothing is going on in his life.
